summary: Draft PR against mnmainrule that decompiled one menu-main-rule function fully and brought two adjacent transition/setup functions very close to matching, while also tightening several mnmain/mnmainrule header prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete void/signature forms. It was closed without merge. The only recorded feedback is the decomp.dev bot report showing mn_802307F8 as a new 100% match and mn_8023164C/mn_80231714 as 99.90% improvements.

key_files.role: Main decompilation target; added mn_802307F8, mn_8023164C, and mn_80231714 bodies plus local externs and a temporary GObjBitfield layout.
Updated prototypes for mn_802307F8, mn_8023164C, and mn_80231714 from unknown signatures to concrete void/signature declarations.
Removed placeholder comments for already-present small helpers and added dont_inline pragmas around mn_8022EA08 and mn_8022EA78.
Replaced several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with concrete void signatures for mnmain functions.

what_changed: Implemented mn_802307F8(s32 arg0, s32 arg1, s32 arg2), which clears an existing SIS/text object at data+0x130, chooses a text/message index using arg1, arg2, mn_804D4B96, and mn_803EC818, creates a new HSD_Text through HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC, sets font_size.x/y from mn_804DBE2C, and calls HSD_SisLib_803A6368.

Implemented mn_8023164C(void), which updates mn_804A04F0 menu flow state, sets cur_menu to 0xD, chooses hovered_selection/mode based on the previous menu, creates a GObj proc with fn_8022F538, writes its render_plink bitfield, and passes mn_80230E38(mode) to HSD_GObj_80390CD4.
Implemented mn_80231714(void) with the same setup as mn_8023164C and an additional assignment mn_804D6BD4 = 1.
Added a local GObjBitfield typedef with padding and bitfields so the code can write render_plink on the created HSD_GObj.
Added extern declarations in mnmainrule.c for mn_804D6BD4, mn_804D4B96, mn_803EC818, and several f32 constants mn_804DBE18 through mn_804DBE2C.
Updated mnmainrule.h prototypes for mn_802307F8, mn_8023164C, and mn_80231714 to concrete signatures.
Updated mnmain.h prototypes for mn_8022EBDC, mn_8022F268, mn_8022F360, and mn_8022F4CC to concrete void-return signatures.
Added #pragma dont_inline on/off around mn_8022EA08 and mn_8022EA78 in mnmain.c, apparently to preserve codegen boundaries for matching.
Removed placeholder decomp comments for mn_8022EA08, mn_8022EA78, mn_8022EB24, and mn_8022EB78 in mnmain.c because those functions are present as C.
smart_moves: Used narrow prototype cleanup in headers alongside the new implementations, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS surface without over-naming unknown data structures.
Kept unknown data in mn_802307F8 as byte-pointer offset accesses, which is often safer for matching when the real struct layout is not yet established.
Used #pragma dont_inline around small numeric helper functions in mnmain.c, a targeted codegen control that can prevent nearby functions from changing unexpectedly.
Matched the menu transition functions by preserving duplicated control flow between mn_8023164C and mn_80231714, with only the extra mn_804D6BD4 side effect in mn_80231714.
Introduced a minimal bitfield view only for the needed HSD_GObj render_plink write, avoiding a broader speculative rewrite of HSD_GObj.
decomp_lessons: When decompiling menu code with partially known state structs, raw offset access such as data+0x130 and data+2 can be an acceptable interim matching tactic, but it should become a named struct once enough fields are known.
Concrete void prototypes should be propagated to headers as soon as a function body proves the return behavior; this reduces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS churn for future callers.
Small helper functions can perturb matching through inlining; localized #pragma dont_inline blocks are useful when the original binary kept calls separate.
Near-duplicate functions should be decompiled side-by-side so their shared structure and single differing side effect are obvious.
Bitfield writes may require a locally shaped overlay struct when the canonical engine struct does not yet expose the relevant packed field.
naming_conventions: Unidentified functions retain address-based names such as mn_802307F8, mn_8023164C, and mn_80231714.
The local callback-like symbol keeps the fn_ prefix: fn_8022F538.
Menu globals use the mn_ address/global convention, e.g. mn_804A04F0, mn_804D6BD4, mn_804D4B96, and mn_803EC818.
Asset/scene externs use MenMain-prefixed names such as MenMain_fog, MenMain_lights, MenMain_cam, MenMainCursorIs_Top, MenMainConSs_Top, and MenMainCursorSs_Top.
Unknown or layout-only fields remain offset/pad-style names such as pad, x0, x4, and data+0x130 rather than invented semantic names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Wrapped mn_8022EA08 and mn_8022EA78 with #pragma dont_inline on/off to control compiler inlining.
Used a raw u8* cast for arg0 in mn_802307F8 to reproduce field accesses at offsets 0x130 and 2 without committing to a full struct.
Used `(u32) (arg1 - 5) <= 1` to express a compact unsigned range check matching likely assembly branch behavior.
Kept an explicit temporary `s32 r30 = arg2`, matching the selected message/index value across multiple branches.
Set both font_size.x and font_size.y through a local `f32 zero = mn_804DBE2C`, likely preserving load/reuse codegen.
Used a local packed-bitfield overlay `GObjBitfield` to assign `render_plink` directly on an HSD_GObj instance.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report showed matched code increased by 248 bytes and overall matched code by +0.01%. mn_802307F8 became a new 100.00% match; mn_80231714 improved by 207 bytes to 99.90%; mn_8023164C improved by 199 bytes to 99.90%.
No human review comments or PR body were present in the provided context.

follow_up_queries: Look for a later merged PR that finishes mn_8023164C and mn_80231714 from 99.90% to 100%.
Search for later struct recovery around the data object used by mn_802307F8, especially fields at offsets 0x2 and 0x130.
Check whether GObjBitfield/render_plink was later replaced by a canonical HSD_GObj field definition.
Verify whether the dont_inline pragmas around mn_8022EA08 and mn_8022EA78 persisted or were superseded by later matching changes.
Find later cleanup moving mnmainrule externs into proper headers instead of local declarations.
